headings.strategy: Editorial serif, tight tracking, used for large authoritative statements. Brings a sophisticated, high-end UK agency feel.

body.strategy: Confident modern sans-serif for high legibility in dense data and process explanations.

layout_spacing.strategy: Generous spacing. Use p-12 to p-24 for main sections. Use asymmetrical 'Bento' grids for feature highlights.
layout_spacing.border_radius: rounded-none or max rounded-sm. Keep edges sharp for a serious, non-playful enterprise feel.

key_functionalities: In-house date/time booking form (custom, saved to DB)
Marketplace trust bar (Amazon, eBay, Etsy, Lazada, Zalora, Noon)

components_strategy.forms: Use Shadcn UI. Keep styling sharp with minimal to no radius. High contrast borders. No soft drop shadows.
components_strategy.buttons: High contrast solid blocks. Primary: Dark Slate (#0B0F19) with White text, OR Marketplace Orange (#FF9900) with Dark text. Hover: -translate-y-1 with a sharp solid shadow.
components_strategy.navigation: Crystal glassmorphism sticky header (backdrop-blur-xl bg-white/80) with 1px border-b. High contrast logo.
components_strategy.trust_bar: Grayscale logos that turn full color on hover. Use react-icons/si (SiAmazon, SiEbay, SiEtsy) or styled text for unavailable ones.
components_strategy.cards: Flat background, 1px subtle border, no initial shadow. Hover brings a sharp drop-shadow and slight lift.
components_strategy.data_testid: MANDATORY on all interactive elements (buttons, links, form inputs).

seo_guidelines.title_template: {Page Name} | GlobiSync | UK Ecommerce Agency in Birmingham
seo_guidelines.meta_description: GlobiSync is a Birmingham-based UK ecommerce agency helping ambitious brands expand across global marketplaces like Amazon, eBay, and Etsy.

instructions_to_main_agent: Initialize Tailwind config with the specified colors, Playfair Display for serif, and Plus Jakarta Sans for sans.
Use react-icons/si for the marketplace trust bar. For missing icons like Noon or Zalora, use text styling that matches their brand vibe.
Implement a custom date/time booking form on the Contact page using Shadcn Form components. Ensure it simulates saving to a DB.
Build a Floating WhatsApp button using react-icons/fa (FaWhatsapp) placed fixed at the bottom right. Use #25D366.
Use the provided image URLs strictly. DO NOT use generic placeholders.
Ensure SEO tags are implemented via react-helmet or native Next.js/React document head strategies, including 'UK ecommerce agency' and 'Birmingham'.
All interactive elements MUST have `data-testid` attributes.
Create dynamic, asymmetrical sections, specifically for the Services and Case Studies pages to avoid the generic agency template look.
